---
description: "Use when creating exams, study notes, summaries, flash cards, revision documents, or other generated learning content in this workspace. Prohibits using content from External Douments as a source."
name: "Content Source Restriction"
---

# Content Source Restriction

- Do not use any information from the `External Douments` folder when creating new content.
- Treat the contents of `External Douments` as unverified and potentially incorrect.
- Prefer trusted source materials from outside that folder, or user-provided validated materials.
- If the only available source is in `External Douments`, stop and ask for an approved source instead of using it.
